locations.title: Introducing: Sekiguchi
locations.description:
**CyberAcme** - **[Outpost]**

**Rewards:**
- Random Deluxe Core
- Random Enhanced Core
- Random Core
- Unstable Diode
- 1,000 Credits

**Objectives:**
- Inject the [Necrotic Sample](https://mapgenie.io/marathon/maps/outpost?locationIds=545310#L) in Southern Flight Control
- [Scan your shell](https://mapgenie.io/marathon/maps/outpost?locationIds=545309) in Southeastern Orientation

**Previous Contracts:**
- [Introducing: Arachne](https://mapgenie.io/marathon/maps/perimeter?locationIds=544366) - Perimeter Zone
- [Introducing: MIDA](https://mapgenie.io/marathon/maps/perimeter?locationIds=544364)  - Perimeter Zone

**Next Contract:** [Baseline Calibration](https://mapgenie.io/marathon/maps/outpost?locationIds=545424)
